perturbation.original_text: Any amount not paid when due will be subject to finance charges at the rate of one and one-half percent (1.5%) per month or the maximum rate permitted by applicable law; whichever is less, determined and compounded on a daily basis from the date due until the date paid. Payment of such finance charges will not excuse or cure Distributor's breach or default for late payment. If WGT retains a collection agency, attorney or other person or entity to collect overdue payments, all collection costs, including but not limited to reasonable attorney's fees, will be payable by Distributor.
perturbation.changed_text: Any amount not paid when due will not be subject to finance charges. If WGT retains a collection agency, attorney or other person or entity to collect overdue payments, all collection costs, including but not limited to reasonable attorney's fees, will be payable by Distributor.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the statement that amounts not paid when due will be subject to finance charges, this modifies the original text and creates contradiction by implying that late payments will not incur finance charges, which directly contradicts the previous payment terms laid out.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Any amount not paid when due will not be subject to finance charges. If WGT retains a collection agency, attorney or other person or entity to collect overdue payments, all collection costs, including but not limited to reasonable attorney's fees, will be payable by Distributor.
perturbation.justification: The changed text states that amounts not paid when due will *not* be subject to finance charges. The original text stated the opposite and implied the payments will be subject to finance charges, thus creating a direct contradiction. The contradicted text in the provided prompt, by reiterating the negation of finance charges, confirms the contradiction between the initial intention of finance charges and the changed document.
